title: Single White Cake Box and Silver Round Board Pack - Thick Drum for Wedding, Party etc (11 Inches)
features: HIGH QUALITY - This white cake box & round drum combo set is the perfect way to safely and efficiently transport your baked creations to any event. Referred as a Cake Drum, this is the STRONGEST type of Cake Board. Made with fibre board inners, covered at the top & around the sides with a beautiful silver foil with pattern and white paper on the base.

STRONG - This cake box & lid is ideal for keeping your freshly baked cakes from damage during transportation. It is strong enough for any type of cake, from light sponge cakes to heavier fruit cakes. The drum is 13mm thick, making it perfect to safely carry your baked creations!

RE-USEABLE - With careful use, this box and drum can potentially be reused after each use. You can also customise the box or drum with your branded sticker, or you can decorate them with a lovely ribbon (be sure to check out the LARRYROO range of ribbons)
ENDLESS USES - This cake box & drum combo has an endless number of uses - Such as birthdays, Christmas, anniversaries, New Years eve, weddings, valentines, baby showers, parties & so much more!
SIMPLE TO ASSEMBLE - The box is supplied flat packed, ensuring convenience storage for you but it is very easy to assemble in seconds, ready for all your needs.
description: Product Description Beautiful Silver Cake Drum High Quality White Cake Box LarryRoo Round Single Silver Cake Drum & Cake Box Combo - Select your Size from the options LarryRoo Round Single Silver Cake Drum & Cake Box Combo Set Ideal to safely transport & present your cakes. The cake Drums are available in a range of sizes to suit all cakes. Simply select the required size from the options available. Perfect for any occasion such as valentines, birthdays, Christmas, weddings, parties etc. Each drum is 13mm thick - this is the strongest type of cake board. Includes a white cake box, made from high quality card. Each drum is made with food safe fibre board & silver foil Each box is made from quality card for a high-quality look / feel LarryRoo Windowed Cupcake Boxes LarryRoo White Cake Boxes LarryRoo Square Single Colourful Cake Drum LarryRoo Silver Round Cake Drums LarryRoo Silver Square Cake Drums Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 445 4.6 out of 5 stars 436 4.2 out of 5 stars 47 4.6 out of 5 stars 404 5.0 out of 5 stars 3 Description These White Cupcake Boxes are perfect for transporting or displaying your gorgeous cupcakes. Available in a range of sizes to fit 1, 2, 4, 6, 12 or 24 cupcakes, you will find the perfect box for your creations. These White cake boxes are ideal for safely and efficiently transporting any cake. Available in sizes from 7 Inches all the way up to 20 Inches, you will find the perfect box for your masterpieces! These colourful square cake drums are the perfect, bright addition to suitable Cake Boxes - Designed to fit perfectly in the boxes. Available in a range of sizes from 6" - 20" in a wide range of vibrant colours. Silver round cake drums in a range of sizes and pack quantities go perfectly with our Cake Boxes for a perfect fit. Available in sizes 4 Inches up to 20 Inches. Silver square cake drums in a range of sizes and pack quantities go perfectly with our Cake Boxes for a perfect fit. Available in sizes 4 Inches up to 20 Inches. Pack Size Available in a range of pack sizes from 1 - 100.
